name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Premium noise-canceling over-ear headphones featuring industry-leading sound quality, exceptional call clarity, and up to 30 hours of battery life.

name: Apple iPad Air (M2)
description: Powerful 11-inch tablet equipped with the Apple M2 chip, a liquid retina display, 128GB storage, and support for the Apple Pencil Pro.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: An ergonomic wireless performance mouse featuring 8K DPI tracking, quiet click switches, and a MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel for ultimate productivity.

name: Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K)
description: An ultra-high-capacity 24,000mAh portable charger with a smart digital display and 140W fast-charging capabilities for laptops and smartphones.

name: Kindle Paperwhite (16 GB)
description: A waterproof e-reader featuring a 6.8-inch glare-free display, an adjustable warm light, and up to 10 weeks of battery life.
